summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse Mother's Day clip: lightly captioned static podium footage of Trump thanking America's moms and Angel/Gold Star moms in the Rose Garden. A raw speech with a headline caption banner and subtitles; no music or cinematic styling.
notable_text: President Trump to America's Moms: 'You Have The Most Important Job There Is'; The White House; Gold Star moms
